action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: No hand washing facility in or adjacent to toilet room or within 25 feet of a food preparation, food service or ware washing area.  Hand washing facility not accessible, obstructed or used for non-hand washing purposes. No hot and cold running water or water at inadequate pressure. No soap or acceptable hand-drying device.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Shellfish not from approved source, not or improperly tagged/labeled; tags not retained for 90 days.
Raw, cooked or prepared food is adulterated, contaminated, cross-contaminated, or not discarded in accordance with HACCP plan.
Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not held by manager or supervisor of food operations.
